<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class ReferSip extends TwiML { /** * ReferSip constructor. * * @param string $sipUrl SIP URL */ public function __construct($sipUrl) { parent::__construct('Sip', $sipUrl); } }
